issuesFound.title: NavDropdown disclosure button missing aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The button that controls the submenu does not communicate its expanded state to assistive technology, preventing screen reader users from knowing whether the menu is open or closed.
issuesFound.fix: `<button type="button" aria-expanded={isOpen} aria-controls={menuId} aria-haspopup="true" className="nav-link nav-link--dropdown-trigger" onClick={onToggle}>`

issuesFound.title: MobileNav subsection toggle missing aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The button that expands and collapses mobile navigation subsections lacks aria-expanded, failing to communicate the current state to assistive technology.
issuesFound.fix: `<button type="button" aria-expanded={isExpanded} aria-controls={sectionId} className="mobile-nav__link mobile-nav__link--trigger" onClick={() => setOpenSectionId(isExpanded ? null : item.href)}>`

issuesFound.title: FaqItemComponent disclosure button missing aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The FAQ question button does not indicate whether the answer panel is currently expanded or collapsed.
issuesFound.fix: `<button type="button" id={btnId} aria-expanded={isOpen} aria-controls={panelId} className="faq-item__trigger" onClick={() => onToggle(item.id)}>`

issuesFound.title: ThemeToggle IconButton missing accessible name
issuesFound.explanation: The theme toggle button contains only an emoji icon and lacks an aria-label, making its purpose unclear to screen reader users.
issuesFound.fix: `<IconButton aria-label={LABELS[theme]} onClick={() => setTheme(NEXT[theme])} className="theme-toggle">`

issuesFound.title: MobileNav close IconButton missing accessible name
issuesFound.explanation: The close button for the mobile navigation panel contains only an "✕" symbol and lacks an accessible name.
issuesFound.fix: `<IconButton aria-label="Close navigation menu" onClick={onClose} className="mobile-nav__close">`

issuesFound.title: TestimonialsCarousel previous button missing accessible name
issuesFound.explanation: The carousel previous button contains only the "‹" character and lacks an accessible name.
issuesFound.fix: `<IconButton aria-label="Previous testimonial" aria-controls={trackId} onClick={handlePrev} className="testimonials-track__prev">`

issuesFound.title: TestimonialsCarousel next button missing accessible name
issuesFound.explanation: The carousel next button contains only the "›" character and lacks an accessible name.
issuesFound.fix: `<IconButton aria-label="Next testimonial" aria-controls={trackId} onClick={handleNext} className="testimonials-track__next">`

issuesFound.title: TextInput component missing aria-invalid attribute
issuesFound.explanation: The component accepts an invalid prop but does not apply aria-invalid to the input element, preventing screen readers from announcing the error state.
issuesFound.fix: `<input id={id} className={['form-input', invalid ? 'form-input--error' : '', className].filter(Boolean).join(' ')} aria-invalid={invalid ? "true" : undefined} {...rest} />`

issuesFound.title: Textarea component missing aria-invalid attribute
issuesFound.explanation: The component accepts an invalid prop but does not apply aria-invalid to the textarea element.
issuesFound.fix: `<textarea id={id} className={['form-textarea', invalid ? 'form-textarea--error' : '', className].filter(Boolean).join(' ')} aria-invalid={invalid ? "true" : undefined} {...rest} />`

issuesFound.title: Select component missing aria-invalid attribute
issuesFound.explanation: The component accepts an invalid prop but does not apply aria-invalid to the select element.
issuesFound.fix: `<select id={id} className={['form-select', invalid ? 'form-select--error' : '', className].filter(Boolean).join(' ')} aria-invalid={invalid ? "true" : undefined} {...rest} >`

issuesFound.title: Checkbox component missing aria-invalid attribute
issuesFound.explanation: The component accepts an invalid prop but does not apply aria-invalid to the checkbox input.
issuesFound.fix: `<input id={id} type="checkbox" aria-describedby={errorId} aria-invalid={invalid ? "true" : undefined} className="checkbox-input" {...rest} />`

issuesFound.title: BillingToggle monthly button missing aria-pressed
issuesFound.explanation: The monthly billing toggle button does not communicate its selected state to assistive technology.
issuesFound.fix: `<button type="button" id="billing-monthly" aria-pressed={value === 'monthly'} className={['billing-toggle__btn', value === 'monthly' ? 'billing-toggle__btn--active' : ''].filter(Boolean).join(' ')} onClick={() => onChange('monthly')}>`

issuesFound.title: BillingToggle annual button missing aria-pressed
issuesFound.explanation: The annual billing toggle button does not communicate its selected state to assistive technology.
issuesFound.fix: `<button type="button" id="billing-annual" aria-pressed={value === 'annual'} className={['billing-toggle__btn', value === 'annual' ? 'billing-toggle__btn--active' : ''].filter(Boolean).join(' ')} onClick={() => onChange('annual')}>`

issuesFound.title: FilterTabs buttons missing aria-pressed
issuesFound.explanation: The filter category buttons do not communicate which filter is currently active via aria-pressed.
issuesFound.fix: `<button type="button" aria-pressed={activeFilter === tab.value} className={['filter-tab-btn', activeFilter === tab.value ? 'filter-tab-btn--active' : ''].filter(Boolean).join(' ')} tabIndex={activeFilter === tab.value ? 0 : -1} onClick={() => onChange(tab.value)}>`

issuesFound.title: HeroSection video toggle missing aria-pressed
issuesFound.explanation: The play/pause button toggles video playback but does not communicate the current playing state via aria-pressed.
issuesFound.fix: `<Button variant="ghost" size="sm" aria-pressed={isPlaying} aria-label={isPlaying ? 'Pause background video' : 'Play background video'} onClick={handleTogglePlay} className="hero-section__video-toggle">`

issuesFound.title: Button component missing aria-busy
issuesFound.explanation: The button component shows a loading state visually but does not communicate the busy state to assistive technology via aria-busy when isLoading is true.
issuesFound.fix: `<button type={type} disabled={isDisabled} aria-disabled={isDisabled || undefined} aria-busy={isLoading} className={['btn', `btn--${variant}`, `btn--${size}`, className].filter(Boolean).join(' ')} {...rest} >`

issuesFound.title: DesktopNav current link missing aria-current
issuesFound.explanation: The current page navigation link is styled visually but not programmatically identified via aria-current="page".
issuesFound.fix: `{item.label}`

issuesFound.title: MobileNav current link missing aria-current
issuesFound.explanation: The current page navigation link in the mobile menu is styled visually but lacks aria-current="page".
issuesFound.fix: `{item.label}`

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation toggle missing aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation toggle button does not communicate the expanded state of the navigation panel via aria-expanded.
issuesFound.fix: `<button id={toggleId} ref={menuToggleRef} type="button" aria-expanded={isOpen} aria-controls={menuId} aria-label={isOpen ? 'Close navigation menu' : 'Open navigation menu'} className="mobile-nav-toggle" onClick={isOpen ? close : open}>`

issuesFound.title: MobileNav dialog missing aria-modal
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation dialog lacks aria-modal="true", which prevents assistive technology from recognizing it as a modal dialog.
issuesFound.fix: `<div id={menuId} ref={panelRef} role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label={\`\${SITE.name} navigation\`} className={['mobile-nav', isOpen ? 'mobile-nav--open' : ''].filter(Boolean).join(' ')} hidden={!isOpen}>`

issuesFound.title: Modal dialog aria-modal placement
issuesFound.explanation: The aria-modal attribute is incorrectly placed on the overlay element instead of the dialog element itself.
issuesFound.fix: Move `aria-modal="true"` from the overlay div to the inner div: `<div ref={dialogRef} role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby={titleId} ...>`

issuesFound.title: HeroSection landmark missing accessible name
issuesFound.explanation: The hero section landmark lacks an accessible name to distinguish it from other page sections.
issuesFound.fix: `<section aria-labelledby="hero-heading" className="hero-section">`

issuesFound.title: StatsBar landmark missing accessible name
issuesFound.explanation: The statistics section landmark lacks an accessible name despite having a heading that could label it.
issuesFound.fix: `<section aria-labelledby="stats-heading" className="stats-bar">`

issuesFound.title: PlanCard article missing accessible name
issuesFound.explanation: The pricing plan card article lacks an accessible name to identify it in the document structure.
issuesFound.fix: `<article aria-labelledby={headingId} className="pricing-card__article">`

issuesFound.title: SkipLinks navigation missing accessible name
issuesFound.explanation: The skip links navigation landmark lacks an accessible name to distinguish it from other navigation regions.
issuesFound.fix: `<nav aria-label="Skip links">`

issuesFound.title: DesktopNav navigation missing accessible name
issuesFound.explanation: The main navigation landmark lacks an accessible name to distinguish it from other navigation regions.
issuesFound.fix: `<nav id="main-nav" aria-label="Main navigation" className="desktop-nav">`

issuesFound.title: StarRating container missing role="img"
issuesFound.explanation: The star rating container lacks role="img", preventing it from being recognized as a graphical element with a text alternative.
issuesFound.fix: `<span role="img" aria-label={\`\${labelPrefix}: \${value} out of \${max} stars\`}>`

issuesFound.title: StarRating individual stars not hidden from AT
issuesFound.explanation: Individual star symbols are read as text content by screen readers despite the container providing the rating value via aria-label.
issuesFound.fix: `{filled ? '★' : '☆'}`

issuesFound.title: NavDropdown decorative chevron not hidden
issuesFound.explanation: The dropdown chevron arrow is decorative but not hidden from assistive technology.
issuesFound.fix: `{isOpen ? '▲' : '▼'}`

issuesFound.title: Button loading spinner not hidden
issuesFound.explanation: The loading spinner inside the button is decorative (accompanied by visually hidden text) but not hidden from assistive technology.
issuesFound.fix: `<span className="btn-spinner" aria-hidden="true" />`

issuesFound.title: IntegrationsBar clone list not hidden
issuesFound.explanation: The duplicated list of integration logos for visual looping is not hidden from assistive technology, causing duplicate content to be announced.
issuesFound.fix: `<ul role="list" className="integrations-bar__list" aria-hidden="true">`

issuesFound.title: TestimonialsCarousel hidden slides not hidden from AT
issuesFound.explanation: Non-visible carousel slides are not hidden from assistive technology, causing all testimonials to be announced regardless of which is visible.
issuesFound.fix: `<div role="group" aria-roledescription="slide" aria-label={\`Quote \${i + 1} of \${total}\`} aria-hidden={!isVisible} className={['testimonial-slide', isVisible ? 'testimonial-slide--visible' : ''].filter(Boolean).join(' ')}>`

issuesFound.title: MobileNav backdrop missing aria-hidden
issuesFound.explanation: The visual backdrop overlay is not hidden from assistive technology.
issuesFound.fix: `<div className="mobile-nav-backdrop" aria-hidden="true" onClick={onClose} />`

issuesFound.title: HeroSection overlay missing aria-hidden
issuesFound.explanation: The visual overlay is decorative but not hidden from assistive technology.
issuesFound.fix: `<div className="hero-section__overlay" aria-hidden="true" />`
